chunks.text: End of Semester - Labs Close, Accounts Expire Instructional class accounts and some named/cs199 accounts expire Monday May 20 at 9am Cardkey access to the EECS Instructional labs expires Friday May 17 at 11:59pm. For more information and a list of ac

at 11:59pm. For more information and a list of accounts that will expire, see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/End-of-Semester Questions to inst@eecs.berkeley.edu EECS Instructional Support Group 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
